nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Areas of smoke and a slight chance of rain showers. Partly cloudy. Low around 59, with temperatures rising to around 62 overnight. West southwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Independence Day
nws.shortForecast: Areas Of Smoke then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: Areas of smoke before noon, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between noon and 2pm, then patchy smoke and a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 3pm, then patchy smoke and a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny. High near 89, with temperatures falling to around 87 in the afternoon. East northeast wind 5 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Areas Of Smoke
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy smoke before 8pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 10pm, then areas of smoke. Mostly clear. Low around 59, with temperatures rising to around 62 overnight. South southeast wind 7 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy smoke before 2pm, then patchy smoke and a slight chance of rain showers between 2pm and 3pm, then patchy smoke and a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 3pm and 5pm. Sunny, with a high near 93. South wind 2 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Sunday Night
